hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); if echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then result=$(uvx ruff check "$f" 2>&1); rc=$?; if [ $rc -ne 0 ]; then safe_result=$(printf '%s' "$result" | tr -cd '\11\12\15\40-\176'); snippet=$(printf '%s' "$safe_result" | sed -n '1,40p'); jq -n --arg hdr "Ruff issues in $f (exit $rc). Fix them:" --arg body "$snippet" '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":($hdr + "\n" + $body)}}'; fi; fi; true
